use clap::{Parser, Subcommand};

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[command(subcommand)]
    command: Commands,
}

#[derive(Subcommand)]
enum Commands {
    Lint { path: String },
    Format { path: String },
    Check { path: String },
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    match cli.command {
        Commands::Lint { path } => {
            let config = load_config(&path);
            run_lint(&config);
        }
        Commands::Format { path } => {
            let config = load_config(&path);
            run_format(&config);
        }
        Commands::Check { path } => {
            let config = load_config(&path);
            run_check(&config);
        }
    }
}

fn load_config(_path: &str) -> Config { todo!() }
fn run_lint(_config: &Config) { todo!() }
fn run_format(_config: &Config) { todo!() }
fn run_check(_config: &Config) { todo!() }
struct Config;
